messages.content:
Name the three methods for interfering with GPS signals?

Review Later
Jamming, Masking and Spoofing
Justifying, Meaconing and Signal
Justifying, Masking, Spoofing
Jamming, Meaconing and Spoofing
The correct answer is "Jamming, Spoofing, and Meaconing."

A competent operator should be able to monitor what areas?

Review Later
Aircraft
Ground control station
Surrounding environment
Radio communications
Hazards
Wind direction
All of the above
All of the above.

To minimise the effect of empty field myopia you should?

Review Later
Wear glasses or contact lenses corrected for myopia
Focus frequently on distant visible objects on the horizon
Look at the ground control station and focus closely
Consult an ophthalmologist to be tested for astigmatism
Focus frequently on distant visible objects on the horizon.

Stress can be reduced by a number of ways, which of the below will reduce stress?

Review Later
Review your environment and make changes
Talk openly with your human resources manager or employ
Live a healthy lifestyle
Avoid alcohol and drugs
Don’t take your stress out on loved ones
All the above
All of the above.

Check sheets are a great way of reducing risk and stress, should they be used every time before flying?

Review Later
Yes
Only when I haven’t flown for a long time
Only if the aircraft hasn’t been flown in 1 month
No
Yes.

A mental process where by the pilot or person recognises, evaluates information and analyses the situation regardless of themselves, the environment and the aircraft is known as good what?

Review Later
Luck
Piloting
Judgment
Technical knowledge
Judgment.

How far should bystanders be from the launch/landing area?

Review Later
10 metres
15 metres
30 metres
Behind the pilot
Behind the pilot.

What does a higher value in the Consequence table indicate?

Review Later
More likely that injury could occur
More likely that any damage would be expensive
More chances of airspace compliance issues
All of the above
More likely that any damage would be expensive.

Who is responsible for reporting defects found in the field?

Review Later
The CEO
The pilot flying on the day
The Ground Crew
The Maintenance Controller or Chief Pilot
The Maintenance Controller or Chief Pilot.

Where is the best place to find operational information about the RPAS?

Review Later
The user guide
Friends or family
Preflight checklist
Procedures Manual
Procedures Manual.

Which of the below is a typical failsafe setting available on an RPA in the event of signal loss?

Review Later
Hover and land
Fly away 
Return to home
Shutdown all motors
Return to home.
